title: Mobile Device Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Mobile Device Donation Programs 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CALL TO SAFETY CELL PHONE PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of cell phones and tablets in any condition, including broken or damaged devices. Donated items are refurbished and distributed to community partners. PO Box 42610 Portland, OR 97242 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXTSTEP RECYCLING AND REUSE STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLING DONATION CENTER NEXTSTEP RECYCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of computer hardware, household appliances, and scrap metal. 245 Jackson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 686-2366 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CALL TO SAFETY CELL PHONE PROJECT NEXTSTEP RECYCLING AND REUSE STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING
